headline: Kungfu is built through the same public evidence loop it exposes.
claimBoundary: This snapshot proves public repository activity and exact retained evidence objects. It does not equate pull requests with features, GitHub accounts with Agent actors, or review-search matches with approvals.

mergedPublicPullRequests.label: merged public PRs
mergedPublicPullRequests.limitation: A merged PR is a work item. It may be a feature, fix, documentation, CI, release, promotion, or automation change.

authorSearchMatches.label: author-account matches
authorSearchMatches.limitation: GitHub author identity is not an Agent actor record and is not used as proof of autonomous Agent work.

reviewSearchMatches.label: review-account search matches
reviewSearchMatches.limitation: GitHub reviewed-by search proves discoverability of reviewer participation, not that every matched review was an approval or exact-root review.

projectCutTitleMatches.query: org:kungfu-systems is:pr is:merged merged:2026-06-21T04:45:00Z..2026-07-21T04:45:00Z is:public project-cut in:title
projectCutTitleMatches.label: merged PR titles naming Project Cut
projectCutTitleMatches.limitation: This title search is a visible subset, not the authoritative count of Project Cut objects.

projectCutsWithExplicitEmptyEpisodeDelta.label: Cuts declaring an empty Episode delta

cases.title: Three actors continued one exact Project Cut without a human relay
cases.summary: Actor A settled and exported exact roots. Actor B independently imported, reviewed fit, and rejected six fault classes. Actor C bound the review and continuation plan into a successor Go, Episode, Atlas, Cut, and published commit.

facts.runtimeIsolation: actors A, B, and C used independent fresh-clone runtimes

cases.title: The Hub architecture explanation was built, reviewed, settled, and released through the same loop
cases.summary: Two site implementations were independently reviewed and promoted to production. Kungfu then retained a public Project Cut binding the exact source projection and Xinfa Atlas, with an explicit empty Episode delta because the delivery changed documentation surfaces rather than runtime behavior.

boundaries.statement: A merged pull request is a work item, not a feature count.
A GitHub author account is not an Agent actor identity. Agent claims require public actor, Episode, receipt, or qualification evidence.
A reviewed-by search match is not automatically an approval or an exact-root independent review.
The values are a versioned observation at one exact time, not a live analytics service.
Only public GitHub results and repository evidence marked public are included.

requirements: GitHub CLI with public API access
a clone of kungfu-systems/kungfu for the retained Project Cut scan
commands: gh api -X GET search/issues -f q='org:kungfu-systems is:pr is:merged merged:2026-06-21T04:45:00Z..2026-07-21T04:45:00Z is:public' -f per_page=1 --jq '.total_count'
gh api -X GET search/issues -f q='org:kungfu-systems is:pr is:merged merged:2026-06-21T04:45:00Z..2026-07-21T04:45:00Z is:public author:dongkeren' -f per_page=1 --jq '.total_count'
gh api -X GET search/issues -f q='org:kungfu-systems is:pr is:merged merged:2026-06-21T04:45:00Z..2026-07-21T04:45:00Z is:public reviewed-by:kungfu-origin' -f per_page=1 --jq '.total_count'
gh api -X GET search/issues -f q='org:kungfu-systems is:pr is:merged merged:2026-06-21T04:45:00Z..2026-07-21T04:45:00Z is:public project-cut in:title' -f per_page=1 --jq '.total_count'
